m	Z	m
m Z m!Z!m"Z"m#Z#m$Z$m%Z%m&Z&m'Z'm(Z(m)Z)m*Z*m+Z+m,Z,m-Z-m.Z.m/Z/m0Z0m1Z1m2Z2m3Z3m4Z4m5Z5m6Z6m7Z7m8Z8m9Z9m:Z:m;Z;m<Z<

np.dtype[np.bool_]z"_SupportsDType[np.dtype[np.bool_]]z

np.dtype[np.floating]z%_SupportsDType[np.dtype[np.floating]]z
